productDisplayName: Lakme Truewear Color Crush 25 Nail Polish
description: WHAT IT IS?It is a long-lasting formula that locks moisture onto your nails while giving your nails a dazzling shineWHAT IT DOES?Comes with Color Lock Technology that ensures the color stays on your nails for longThe chip-resistant feature keeps the color intactCoats your nails to perfection; giving them a vibrant and elegant lookFEATURESContains resins with color lock technologyStrengthens nails with a long-lasting nail enamelChip-resistantNew glitter shades that give your nails a silk sheenLakme True Wear Color Crush coats your nails to perfection; giving them a vibrant and elegant lookThe Lakme Truewear nail color range will add sparkle to your everyday lifeABOUT THE COLLECTIONLakme True Wear Color Crush coats your nails to perfection; giving them a vibrant and elegant look. It has color lock technology that ensures the color stays on your nails for long and is resin-based, making it a perfect choice. A color for all seasons and occasions, the shades are simply a must-have. The range strengthens nails with long-lasting, chip resistant nail enamel. The new additions of exciting sparkly shades give your nails a silk sheen.ABOUT THE BRANDLakme is India's No.1 color cosmetics brand offering a wide range of high-end, world-class color cosmetics and skincare products. Lakme has a vast product range specially crafted by experts for the Indian skin. The brand has also been redefining fashion in India with Lakme Fashion Week, India's premier fashion event.
